crons.name: retention-cleanup-daily
crons.description: CHG-0830: Daily session/trajectory retention cleanup (03:00 AEST)
crons.notes: Enable after CHG-0830 approval. Runs daily at 03:00 AEST. UTC: 0 17 * * * = 03:00 AEST.

crons.name: retention-cleanup-report
crons.description: CHG-0830: Weekly retention cleanup audit report (Monday 05:00 AEST)
crons.notes: Enable after CHG-0830 approval. Runs weekly Monday at 05:00 AEST. UTC: 0 19 * * 0 = 05:00 AEST Monday.
